surcharges.title: ⚡ Swiss Emergency, Night & Weekend Surcharge Rules
surcharges.summary: Standard Swiss trade rules for emergency callouts and off-hours service pricing:

surchargeRules.description: Standard Swiss trade agreement surcharge for emergency night calls.
Applies to non-scheduled urgent weekend repair requests.
Applies to 1. August, Christmas, New Year, and cantonal holidays.

actionPoints: ⚠️ **Notify Client upfront**: Always state the emergency callout fee in chat before dispatching to the job site.
📱 **Enable 24/7 Urgent Toggle**: Providers with Emergency Mode enabled earn 35% higher net margins.
